info.title: Visual Studio Solution Secrets
info.description: Tool for synchronizing Visual Studio solution secrets across different development machines.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Configure the repository to use by default or for the solution in the current directory.

commands.name: change-key
commands.description:
Change the encryption key. By default re-encrypts all existing
secrets with the new key.

options.name: --passphrase
options.description: Passphare for creating the encryption key.

options.name: --keyfile
options.description: Key file path to use for creating the encryption key.

options.name: --skipencryption
options.description:
Skip the re-encryption of secrets encrypted with the old
key.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Delete all the solution secrets from the local machine.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

commands.name: configure
commands.description:
Configure the repository to use by default or for the solution
in the current directory.

options.name: --default
options.description: Changes the default configuration.

options.name: --repo
options.description:
Repository type to use for the solution.
Allowed values are: github, azurekv.

options.name: --name
options.description:
Repository name to use for the solution. This setting applies
only for Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --reset
options.description: Reset the configuration of the solution.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

commands.name: list
commands.description:
List the configuration for solutions.
Run 'configure [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --all
options.description: When true, search in the specified path and its sub-tree.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

commands.name: init
commands.description:
Create the encryption key and setup all needed authorizations to
remote repositories.

options.name: --passphrase
options.description: Passphare for creating the encryption key.

options.name: --keyfile
options.description: Key file path to use for creating the encryption key.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --all
options.description: When true, search in the specified path and its sub-tree.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

commands.name: pull
commands.description: Pull solution secrets and decrypt them.

options.name: --all
options.description: When true, search in the specified path and its sub-tree.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

options.name: --all
options.description: When true, search in the specified path and its sub-tree.

options.name: --overwrite
options.description:
Does not merge remote secrets with local ones, but overwrites
them with locals.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

options.name: --all
options.description: When true, search in the specified path and its sub-tree.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

commands.name: status
commands.description:
Shows the status for the tool and the solutions.
Run 'vs-secrets [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --all
options.description: When true, search in the specified path and its sub-tree.

options.name: --duplicates
options.description: When true, shows also duplicate solutions.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path for searching solutions or single solution file path.

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --default
options.description: Changes the default configuration.

options.name: --name
options.description: Repository name to use for the solution. This setting applies only for Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --repo
options.description: Repository type to use for the solution.

options.name: --reset
options.description: Reset the configuration of the solution.
